mapper.select:
SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, c.cla_goal, u.user_name, c.cla_status, c.cla_startdate, c.cla_enddate, c.cla_maxstu, c.cla_views, c.cla_thumb, c.cla_save_name, c.cla_save_path, (SELECT tet_num FROM test WHERE cla_num = c.cla_num AND ROWNUM = 1) as tetNum FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.user_num = #{userNum}
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY c.cla_num DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(lsn_content) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0) END FROM lesson WHERE cla_num = #{claNum}

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_goal, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views, cla_thumb, cla_save_name, cla_save_path from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num
c.user_num = #{userNum}
and cla_title like '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
order by cla_num desc

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, cla_complete, user_name, u.user_photo, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views, cla_thumb, cla_save_name, cla_save_path, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) AS applyCnt from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num where cla_num = #{claNum}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.CLA_NUM, C.CLA_TITLE, NVL(ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ER.USER_NUM) FROM EXAM_RESULT ER WHERE ER.TET_NUM IN (SELECT TET_NUM FROM TEST WHERE CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM)) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSAPPLY CA WHERE CA.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM), 0) * 100, 0), 0) AS testRate FROM CLASS C WHERE C.USER_NUM = #{userNum} ORDER BY C.CLA_REGDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT B.WEEK_NO || '주차' AS label, ROUND(AVG(B.CUMULATIVE_RATE), 1) AS value FROM ( SELECT A.USER_NUM, A.WEEK_NO, SUM(A.WEEKLY_RATE) OVER(PARTITION BY A.USER_NUM ORDER BY A.WEEK_NO) AS CUMULATIVE_RATE FROM ( SELECT P.USER_NUM, CEIL((TRUNC(P.PRG_LASTDATE) - TRUNC(C.CLA_STARTDATE) + 1) / 7) AS WEEK_NO, (COUNT(CASE WHEN P.PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LESSON L WHERE L.CLA_NUM = P.CLA_NUM), 0)) AS WEEKLY_RATE FROM PROGRESS P INNER JOIN CLASS C ON P.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE P.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} AND P.PRG_LASTDATE >= C.CLA_STARTDATE GROUP BY P.USER_NUM, P.CLA_NUM, C.CLA_STARTDATE, P.PRG_LASTDATE ) A ) B WHERE B.WEEK_NO BETWEEN 1 AND 4 GROUP BY B.WEEK_NO ORDER BY B.WEEK_NO

SELECT NVL(ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ER.USER_NUM) FROM EXAM_RESULT ER WHERE ER.TET_NUM IN (SELECT TET_NUM FROM TEST WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum})) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSAPPLY CA WHERE CA.CLA_NUM = #{claNum}), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS testRate -- 소수점 첫째자리까지 표시하려면 1로 변경 FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_class.nextval FROM dual
insert into class(cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, user_num, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_complete, cla_thumb, cla_save_name, cla_save_path) values (#{claNum}, #{claTitle}, #{claContent}, #{claGoal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claCategory}, #{userNum}, #{claStartDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{claEndDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{claMaxStu, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{claComplete, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claThumb}, #{claSaveName}, #{claSavePath})
mapper.select: select seq_class.nextval as cla_num from dual

SELECT u.user_num, u.user_name, u.user_email FROM users u INNER JOIN classapply ca ON u.user_num = ca.user_num WHERE ca.cla_num = #{claNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MESSAGE m WHERE m.ms_receiver_num = u.user_num AND m.tet_num = #{tetNum} ) ORDER BY u.user_name ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u inner join classapply ca on u.user_num = ca.user_num WHERE ca.cla_num = #{claNum}
AND ( u.user_name LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' OR u.user_email LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' )

SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, c.cla_category, c.cla_content, c.cla_goal, c.cla_complete, c.cla_startdate, c.cla_enddate, c.cla_maxstu, c.cla_status, c.cla_views, u.user_name, u.user_photo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) AS applyCnt FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.cla_status = '승인완료' AND c.cla_enddate >= SYSDATE
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
AND c.cla_category = #{category}
ORDER BY c.cla_views DESC
ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) / c.cla_maxstu DESC
ORDER BY c.cla_regdate DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c
c.cla_status = '승인완료' AND c.cla_enddate >= SYSDATE
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
AND c.cla_category = #{category}

SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, c.cla_category, c.cla_content, c.cla_goal, c.cla_complete, c.cla_startdate, c.cla_enddate, c.cla_maxstu, c.cla_bonus, c.cla_status, c.cla_views, c.cla_thumb, c.cla_save_name, c.cla_save_path, u.user_name FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.cla_status = '승인대기'
AND (c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' OR u.user_name LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY c.cla_num DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.cla_status = '승인대기'
AND (c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' OR u.user_name LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE class SET cla_status = '승인완료', cla_regdate = SYSDATE, cla_startdate = #{claStartDate}, cla_enddate = #{claEndDate}, cla_maxstu = #{claMaxStu}, cla_complete = #{claComplete}, cla_bonus = #{claBonus} WHERE cla_num = #{claNum} AND cla_status = '승인대기'
mapper.select: SELECT CLA_NUM, CLA_TITLE FROM CLASS ORDER BY CLA_REGDATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BONUS_CRITERIA (BC_NUM, CLA_NUM, BC_CONTENT, BC_SCORE, BC_NOTE, USER_NUM, BC_REGDATE) VALUES (BC_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{claNum}, #{bcContent}, #{bcScore}, #{bcNote}, #{userNum}, SYSDATE)
